note: Ready-to-apply plan decisions merge for the autonomous-generalization work. Could not be written from the build session because Neotoma's MCP proxy kept dropping the write session ('session unknown'). Apply from a host with NEOTOMA_BEARER_TOKEN via scripts/apply_pending_plan_decision.py — it POSTs to the REST /correct endpoint, bypassing the MCP proxy. Idempotent: safe to run more than once.

value.a2a_inbound: Adopt the official a2a-sdk (Apache-2.0, Linux Foundation) and expose Apis as an A2A task receiver. A2A is the inbound transport; Neotoma stays canonical store; AAuth + agent_grant stay the authorization layer. Inbound A2A messages become Neotoma task entities (attributed apis@ateles-swarm, source=a2a) which the existing Apis SSE dispatch path routes to T4 workers unchanged. SDK-agnostic core (routing.py, a2a_executor.py, card builder/signer + authorize_caller in a2a_gateway.py) is unit-testable without the SDK; the SDK is imported lazily only inside serve(). Signed Agent Card via Apis P-256 keypair (JWS ES256). Implemented 2026-06-03 in execution/daemons/apis/ with 11/11 passing tests (test_a2a.py); docs/a2a.md added.
value.session_integrity_design: DESIGNED 2026-06-03 (docs/session_integrity.md, commit 35050ea on branch claude/dazzling-jang-ff3f4f). Every write-bearing session (HITL Claude Code/Cursor/Codex + autonomous ateles agents) is mechanically required to: (a) bind to >=1 plan kept current, (b) store turns as conversation+agent_message PART_OF the plan, (c) link derived artifacts REFERS_TO conversation + PART_OF plan. Two enforcement layers: Claude Code lifecycle hooks (best UX, partial) + server-side invariant on the shared MCP/AAuth proxy (mcp_identity_proxy.py + mcp_tool_grant_proxy/proxy.py) for uniform cross-harness coverage. Warn->block rollout; grace path for no-op sessions; harness_event (689230f4) emitted per turn as audit. Canonical artifact taxonomy co-located: 8 closed buckets (analysis, finding, preference, agent_policy, decision_record, transcript, note, escalation) + synonym->bucket map collapsing the ~700-type sprawl; store-time normalization + periodic merge. Closes design tasks ent_1e11760c9761d67cc66baa86 (p1) + ent_872bf00817aba111cdda441a (p2). Impl follow-ups: ent_7205d6c75761b7d12f2a51c9 (CC hooks), ent_f3cd6161d03316e440916933 (proxy invariant).
value.autonomous_generalization: DESIGNED + IMPLEMENTED 2026-06-03 on branch claude/agent-operator-learning-Rrc6M. Agents generalize AGENT-LOCAL from clustered strategy_drift_signal evidence with no per-change human gate, but reversibly. generalizer (lib/daemon_runtime/generalizer.py) + drift parser (drift.py): each emitted '[<agent>] strategy_drift_signal: ...' line is persisted as a strategy_drift_signal entity (canonical fields emitting_agent/observation/severity/work_entity_id; strict:true so rows stay distinct), clustered per-agent by content fingerprint, and at >= agent_strategy.drift_signal_threshold (default 3) auto-creates a provisional agent_policy (scope=agent, rule_kind=prefer, overridable_by columba+operator; maturation JSON in body since v1.1.0 has no notes field). Maturation is EXPOSURE-based not time-based: provisional->active after a clean-application count (3x threshold), and a single contradicting signal suspends it + reopens a strategy_revision_proposal. Guardrails: cross-cutting/higher-layer themes, operator-policy conflicts, and a per-agent auto-policy cap (8) route to operator-gated proposals instead of auto-applying; daemon_report emitted on every change. Policies enforced by injection at dispatch (agent_loader.render_policy_prompt) + Anthus harvests drift from work-entity comments (anthus.py). Revert via scripts/revert_auto_policy.py. NO schema registration needed (strategy_drift_signal already existed; code reconciled to canonical fields + validated via dry-run, unknown_fields_count=0). 25 unit tests green. Decision keep-strategy_drift_signal-channel (vs new preference_signal) and conservative clustering per operator. Runtime-live once a daemon has NEOTOMA_BEARER_TOKEN.
